mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message (sender_id, receiver_id, group_id, content, type, file_size, file_path, thumb_path, duration, status, created_at, updated_at, reply_to_message_id) VALUES (#{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{groupId}, #{content}, #{type}, #{fileSize}, #{filePath}, #{thumbPath}, #{duration}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{createdAt}, #{replyToMessageId})
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_message SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE chat_message SET status = 2, type = 'SYSTEM', content = '撤回了一条消息', file_path = NULL, thumb_path = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM chat_message WHERE (sender_id = #{userId} AND receiver_id = #{friendId}) OR (sender_id = #{friendId} AND receiver_id = #{userId})
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_message SET status = 1 WHERE sender_id = #{friendId} AND receiver_id = #{userId} AND status = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT m.*, u.username as sender_username, u.avatar as sender_avatar FROM chat_message m JOIN user u ON m.sender_id = u.id WHERE
m.group_id = #{groupId}
((m.sender_id = #{userId} AND m.receiver_id = #{friendId}) OR (m.sender_id = #{friendId} AND m.receiver_id = #{userId})) AND m.group_id IS NULL
AND m.type IN ('IMAGE', 'VIDEO') ORDER BY m.created_at DESC

SELECT m.*, u.username as sender_username, u.avatar as sender_avatar FROM chat_message m JOIN user u ON m.sender_id = u.id WHERE
m.group_id = #{groupId}
((m.sender_id = #{userId} AND m.receiver_id = #{friendId}) OR (m.sender_id = #{friendId} AND m.receiver_id = #{userId})) AND m.group_id IS NULL
AND m.file_path IS NOT NULL ORDER BY m.created_at DESC

SELECT m.*, u.username as sender_username, u.avatar as sender_avatar FROM chat_message m JOIN user u ON m.sender_id = u.id WHERE
m.group_id = #{groupId}
((m.sender_id = #{userId} AND m.receiver_id = #{friendId}) OR (m.sender_id = #{friendId} AND m.receiver_id = #{userId})) AND m.group_id IS NULL
AND (m.type = 'TEXT' OR m.type = 'FILE' OR m.type = 'IMAGE' OR m.type = 'VIDEO') AND m.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY m.created_at DESC

SELECT m.*, u.username as sender_username, u.avatar as sender_avatar, COALESCE(g.name, CASE WHEN m.sender_id = #{userId} THEN ru.username ELSE su.username END) as chat_name, CASE WHEN m.group_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'group' ELSE 'friend' END as chat_type, CASE WHEN m.group_id IS NOT NULL THEN m.group_id ELSE CASE WHEN m.sender_id = #{userId} THEN m.receiver_id ELSE m.sender_id END END as chat_id FROM chat_message m JOIN user u ON m.sender_id = u.id LEFT JOIN chat_group g ON m.group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN user su ON m.sender_id = su.id LEFT JOIN user ru ON m.receiver_id = ru.id WHERE ( (m.sender_id = #{userId} OR m.receiver_id = #{userId}) AND m.group_id IS NULL OR m.group_id IN (SELECT group_id FROM group_member WHERE user_id = #{userId}) ) AND (m.type = 'TEXT' OR m.type = 'FILE' OR m.type = 'IMAGE' OR m.type = 'VIDEO') AND m.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY m.created_at DESC LIMIT 100
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND status = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND id > #{lastReadMessageId} AND sender_id != #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message WHERE sender_id = #{userId} OR receiver_id = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM chat_message WHERE (sender_id = #{userId} OR receiver_id = #{userId}) AND file_path IS NOT NULL
SELECT m.* FROM chat_message m JOIN chat_group g ON m.group_id = g.id WHERE g.owner_id = #{ownerId} AND m.file_path IS NOT NULL
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM chat_message WHERE sender_id = #{userId} OR receiver_id = #{userId}
